tweet: This is an opportunity for to us to pass down a legacy to our kids, grand-kids, and generations to come. I believe this will be the most impactful nationwide conservation legislation since the Land and Water Conservation Fund was first created over 50 years ago.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: The Great American Outdoors Act will help us to be good stewards of our public lands while at the same time creating thousands of new jobs —a bipartisan win-win.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: The impact of failing to fund maintenance in our national parks and public lands for so long is clear to see for the hundreds of millions of visitors to our public lands each year. We need to do better at taking care of these special places.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: The Great American Outdoors Act also puts $9.5 billion towards deferred maintenance projects on federal lands. This legislation will be the most significant reduction ever in eliminating a major portion the deferred maintenance backlog on our national parks and public lands.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: We need to secure this funding because since the Land and Water Conservation Fund was established 55 years ago, and despite the fact that every state, every territory, and almost every county has benefited from the LWCF, it has only been fully funded twice in its history.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: 🏖 Tourism – Anything that would attract groups of visitors should be avoided for at least the next two weeks.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: 👷‍♂️ Shiftwork – For essential services where employers are unable to telework, employers should institute shiftwork to ensure six feet of distance between employees at all times.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: 💻 Telework – Every West Virginian who is able to telework should do so to prevent the spread of germs at the workplace.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: ⚕ Testing – Any person experiencing COVID-19 symptoms should be able to get a test. However, due to supply chain limitations that is not possible right now. I am in constant communication with officials to secure more testing for West Virginia.

name: Senator Joe Manchin

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: At the end of Friendly Ice Cream's bankruptcy, most of Friendly’s assets were owned by a Sun Capital affiliate free & clear of any pension claims. Those unfunded pension obligations totaled $115M and are being assumed by the PBGC.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: After filing bankruptcy in 2018, Sears no longer possessed enough assets to pay off its creditors, esp. its pension obligations. Now those pensions are in the hands of the Pension Benefit Guaranty Corp (PBGC), which is Sears’ largest unsecured creditors, which is owed $1.5B+

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: Murray Energy has contributed 97% of the money going into the UMWA pension fund annually. With Murray’s bankruptcy filing, the UMWA pension fund will become insolvent even faster, and this crisis will snowball and impact every other multi-employer pension fund in America.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: It is now the responsibility and duty of Congress to stop this financial engineering and close of the loopholes of our bankruptcy code. My bill, the SLAP Act, does just that.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: For the last few decades, numerous investment firms have manipulated sections of the bankruptcy code to maximize profits by cutting wages, reducing health benefits & slashing pensions. name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: Every paycheck, 10.6M Americans put a portion of their paycheck into a pension account w/ promise & trust that it will be there when they retire. These same people forego pay raises, bonuses & personal retirement accts b/c they believe their pensions will be there until needed.

tweet: We must come together to do our job, & find a solution to reopen the government as soon as possible. I will work around the clock in order to get that done.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: Funding the government is one of our most basic constitutional obligations & now because of partisan politics, the government will shut down. Governing this way is dangerous to our national security and embarrassing for both political parties.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: Governing this way is dangerous to our national security & embarrassing for both political parties. I urge my colleagues to come together, do our job, & find a solution that keeps our government running. I’m prepared to stay here as long as it takes to get that done.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: Funding the government is one of our most basic constitutional obligations. We cannot keep kicking the can down the road just to face the same problems a month later.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: We have important work to do including ensuring our military is equipped to protect our country, fighting the opioid epidemic, keeping our promise to miners so they don’t lose their pensions, funding #CHIP & CHC's, expanding broadband access & passing an infrastructure package.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
tweet: We are already more than 3 months in to FY 2018 & we still don’t have a plan to fund our government. Every time we pass short-term funding, we put our national security at risk, we stall critical projects & throw our economy & our citizens into limb.

tweet: Today, I will vote to keep the government open for a fourth time for FY2018 through a continuing resolution. Just because I will vote to pass this doesn’t mean I like it.

name: Senator Joe Manchin
